behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the files (test/unit/electron/index.js, .github/skills/unit-tests/SKILL.md), the comment prefix '// Treat bare', the `[file...]` usage line requirement, and behavior expectations.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes desired behavior and requires a comment prefix but doesn't dictate exact code; agent must still design the filter/merge logic.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behavior (args.run population, _ contents) via a harness that simulates conversion, allowing multiple implementations; the only specific requirement is the '// Treat bare' comment which is explicitly stated in instruction.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute Node harness with minimist parsing and inspect resulting args.run/args._ behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests like test_bare_ts_file_becomes_run_arg require actual bare-file conversion logic in source to pass (harness also checks source patterns via hasConversionLogic).

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover bare .ts conversion, multiple files, merging with --run, help text update, and SKILL.md update.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with comment headers (pass_to_pass, fail_to_pass) and descriptive docstrings.

no_typos.reason: Paths and filenames appear correct and consistent.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points to the relevant file (index.js) which is part of the task domain; no line numbers or exact code given.
